v1.author: Codex primary adversarial contract tests
v1.evidence: Seven contract assertions cover all phases, minimum inventory paths, live transition and rollback evidence, recoverable quarantine, hooks, all receipt fields, and the fail-closed final claim. Unsafe tar/delete text and any prompt AC-8 pointer are negatively asserted.

v2.author: Claude Code Opus fresh-context read-only review
v2.counterexample_accepted: The AC-1 execution prompt still said Hermes must remain alive until deleted AC-8, even though AC-8 was replaced by HR-0 through HR-7.
v2.sealing: A RED assertion rejecting every AC-8 prompt reference was committed before replacing the pointer with SOT 33 HR-3.
v2.final_evidence: Fresh review found zero AC-8 or unsafe tar/delete instructions in the prompt surfaces and re-derived all HR phases, hooks, 21 receipt fields, and the final fail-closed definition.

status: Contract complete; ready to ship before HR-0 implementation begins
